steps.t: The soldiers Gradir and Tawaris can be found on the northern side of the Second Circle. Talk to Tawaris to hear his side of the argument.
The soldiers Gradir and Tawaris can be found on the northern side of the Second Circle. Talk to Gradir to hear his side of the argument.

You should check the First Circle below the Ship's Prow to see what became of the chicken.
